kicker: MT LEVEL I // CLOSING OUT THE TEST

beats.narration: You found the indication and proved it relevant. Now the part needs a verdict, and that verdict is not yours to invent.

payload.title: THE VERDICT
payload.sub: Evaluation, postcleaning, and the record that closes the inspection.

beats.narration: Evaluation is measuring, not judging. Classify linear or rounded, measure length, then compare against criteria from the code, not your gut.
The numbers move from code to code; the discipline never does. No cracks, ever. Linear over a sixteenth, rejected. Rounded over three sixteenths, rejected.
Then close it out in order. Record results. Demagnetize and verify, since a residual field grips particles and flash rust waits hours. Clean, then protect.
Write it while the part is in front of you. If it is not written down, it did not happen. The record is the only witness.

payload.sub: If it isn't written down, it didn't happen.
